name: Fried Yucca with Feta Cheese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped onion rinsed in boiling water
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the yucca to expose the white flesh and place it in boiling water. Boil for 20 minutes until tender.
2. Remove the yucca from the boiling water and let it cool.
3. When cooled, cut the yucca into slices, making sure to remove the tough center fibers.
4. Heat 1/4 cup vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Once hot, add the yucca slices and fry until browned.
5. While frying the yucca, prepare the sauce by mashing feta cheese and egg yolks together with a fork.
6. Mix in chopped chile pepper and salt to the mashed mixture using beaters.
7. Gradually pour in vegetable oil into the mixture while continuously beating.
8. Add evaporated milk and lemon juice, and beat well until combined.
9. Incorporate the rinsed chopped onion into the sauce.
10. Serve as an appetizer with the sauce for dipping or serve the yucca slices as a side dish with the sauce poured over them.
